bluetooth_confirm.description: Set up {name}? Disable the official Oral-B integration entry for this brush first to avoid duplicate entities.

abort.not_supported: Device is not a supported Oral-B toothbrush
abort.no_devices_found: No Oral-B toothbrush found. Wake the brush (press its button) and try again.

init.description: The brush accepts a single Bluetooth connection at a time, so Home Assistant and the iO Sense charger display cannot both be active during a brushing session. Choose who wins.

options.charger_priority: Charger priority — the iO Sense lights and timer work during brushing; the session syncs to Home Assistant right after it ends
options.live: Live — Home Assistant streams the timer, pressure and quadrant at 1 Hz during brushing; the iO Sense display and phone app will not work
